name: MoneyGram
description_short: Jersey City, NJ's MoneyGram at 245 Central Ave is a standalone check-cashing and money transfer center.
description_long:
MoneyGram's location at 245 Central Ave in Jersey City, NJ is a dedicated check-cashing and money transfer center operating Monday through Thursday 8 AM–8 PM, Friday 8 AM–9 PM, Saturday 8 AM–8 PM, and Sunday 10 AM–7 PM. The Central Ave branch serves Jersey City residents with consistent hours and quick access to essential financial services.

At this Jersey City MoneyGram, you can cash checks, send and receive money transfers, and access additional money services. Call +1 201-659-9000 to confirm available services or speak with staff about your specific transaction needs.

Jersey City residents using the 245 Central Ave MoneyGram appreciate the extended Friday evening hours and accessible location. Bring a valid ID and your check or transfer details for fastest service.
pros: 13 convenient partner locations across Jersey City with varied operating hours starting as early as 7:00 AM
Partner locations include established brands (CVS, Key Food) providing added legitimacy and accessibility
Offers both online and offline transaction management for flexibility
International and domestic money transfer capabilities through single service provider
Multiple service types (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) available at most locations
Partner network includes specialized financial service centers for customers seeking dedicated financial services
Accessible to underbanked populations without requiring traditional bank accounts
cons: Service quality and hours depend entirely on partner locations, creating inconsistent availability and customer experience
No company-owned branches means customer service complaints may be redirected to individual partner locations rather than centralized support
Fees for money transfers are not disclosed on the website, requiring customers to contact individual locations for pricing
Limited information provided about fraud protection, dispute resolution, or customer guarantees
Reliance on partner network means some services may not be available at all 13 locations
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in Jersey City needing convenient check cashing without a bank account
International money senders requiring domestic pickup locations for recipients
Customers seeking quick bill payment services without visiting traditional banks
Residents near partner locations (pharmacies, grocery stores) who value financial services combined with retail shopping
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for Jersey City residents without traditional bank accounts who need accessible, multi-service financial transactions including check cashing and money transfers. The main caveat is that service quality, hours, and fees are determined by individual partner locations, so customers must verify availability and pricing at their specific nearby location rather than assuming consistent service standards across all 13 points.
services: In-person transfer completion at partner locations
Retail-based financial services through pharmacy and grocery store partnerships
Multiservice financial center access through specialized partners
meta_description: MoneyGram at 245 Central Ave, Jersey City, NJ. Cash checks and send money with extended hours.
